{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Worldline
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Worldline]] is a local energy system that powers technology and was once a band of light around the planet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Worldline]] has been almost completely drained by the local inhabitants.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
